query:
UPDATE activity_spots 
SET 
  difficulty = CASE 
    WHEN difficulty IS NULL THEN 'intermediate'
    ELSE difficulty
  END,
  rating = CASE
    WHEN rating IS NULL OR rating = '' THEN '4.5'
    ELSE rating
  END
WHERE spotType = 'dive_site' AND (difficulty IS NULL OR rating IS NULL OR rating = '');
